headline: Leidos Holdings (LDOS) to Offer its Small Cruise Missile to the U.S. Air Force
summary: Leidos Holdings, Inc. (NYSE:LDOS) is one of the best information technology services stocks to buy now. On February 26, Leidos Holdings, Inc. (NYSE:LDOS) announced that the U.S. Air Force has officially designated its Small Cruise Missile as the AGM-190A. This development marks the formal recognition of Leidos’ Small Cruise Missile as an affordable, adaptable stand-off […]
